subject: [PATCH nfs-utils 04/17] support/include: update netlink headers for all cache upcalls

reviews.author: Jeff Layton
reviews.summary: This patch series updates the netlink headers for all cache upcalls in the nfs-utils package, syncing them with the current kernel UAPI header and adding a new bundled sunrpc_netlink.h header for the sunrpc genl family.

2026-03-16.patch_summary: This patch series updates the netlink headers for all cache upcalls in the nfs-utils package, syncing them with the current kernel UAPI header and adding a new bundled sunrpc_netlink.h header for the sunrpc genl family.
